notes: Replaced always-visible information text in the creation wizard with collapsed guidance panels.
Fixed Project and Routine helper checklist item routing so choosing Yes proceeds to the helper item questions.
Replaced the next-day checkbox with an explicit finish date for project steps and routine activities.
Added calendar_end_date to action records so exported calendar times can span overnight or multiple dates correctly.
Added automatic Google Tasks checklist rows for each wizard-created project step or routine activity, with optional helper checklist rows kept separate.
release_notes: Repairs the Pathmark creation wizard so information guidance stays hidden until opened, helper checklist item loops route correctly, and start/end calendar timing uses explicit finish dates rather than a next-day checkbox.
